Class Bomb

java.lang.Object
Assets.Bomb
public class Bomb extends Object
Represents an explosive bomb that can be placed by the Hero to destroy enemies and breakable walls. The bomb has a countdown timer and explodes after a set duration, affecting entities within its blast radius.

  • Constructor Details

    • Bomb

      public Bomb(int x, int y, Map map, Hero hero, Enemy enemy)
      Constructs a new Bomb at the specified position.

      Each bomb has a fixed 3-second timer and a blast radius of 2.

      Parameters:
      x - The x-coordinate where the bomb is placed.
      y - The y-coordinate where the bomb is placed.
      map - The game map where the bomb exists.
      hero - The hero who placed the bomb.
      enemy - (Unused) Placeholder for potential future enemy-related interactions.

  • Method Details

    • countdown

      public void countdown(ArrayList<Enemy> enemies, ArrayList<Snake> snakes)
      Starts the countdown timer for the bomb.

      This method launches a new thread that waits for the bomb’s timer to finish before automatically calling explode(Hero, Map, ArrayList, ArrayList). It allows the countdown to run asynchronously without freezing the game loop.

      Parameters:
      enemies - The list of active enemies that can be affected by the explosion.
      snakes - The list of snake enemies that can also be damaged by the explosion.

    • explode

      public void explode(Hero hero, Map map, ArrayList<Enemy> enemies, ArrayList<Snake> snakes)
      Triggers the bomb explosion and applies its effects to the environment.

      When exploded, the bomb:

      • Displays an explosion marker ('!') temporarily on the map
      • Damages any enemies, snakes, or the hero in its radius
      • Destroys breakable walls ('#')
      Parameters:
      hero - The hero who placed the bomb.
      map - The map on which the bomb resides.
      enemies - The list of active enemies on the map.
      snakes - The list of active snakes on the map.

    • applyBlastRadius

      public void applyBlastRadius(Hero hero, Map map, ArrayList<Enemy> enemies, ArrayList<Snake> snakes)
      Applies the bomb’s blast effects to surrounding map cells.

      The explosion propagates outward in all four cardinal directions (up, down, left, right) up to the blast radius, unless blocked by an unbreakable wall ('X').

      Effects per target:

      • '#' — Breakable wall destroyed (blast stops)
      • 'E' — Enemy killed
      • 'S' — Snake enemy killed
      • 'H' — Hero takes damage
      Parameters:
      hero - The hero potentially affected by the blast.
      map - The game map to modify.
      enemies - The list of enemies that may be hit.
      snakes - The list of snake enemies that may be hit.

    • Destroy

      public void Destroy()
      Destroys the bomb instance, removing it from the game.
